ext.description: Multi-tool sidebar for installed Claude/Codex/Copilot/Cursor/Windsurf/Cline skills with preview, search, remote browse, AI chat, and instruction-file sync
view.container.title: Vibecode Skills
cfg.showScoreBreakdown: Show per-section score breakdown (Lost points / Earned rules) in preview by default
cfg.mirrorGroups: Groups of files that share the same content — saving any one mirrors the full content to the others
cfg.mirrorSkillsByName: Auto-mirror SKILL.md files whose parent directory has the same name across AI tool roots (opt-in)
cfg.mirrorSkillsByNameAlways: Skip the save confirm dialog for skill auto-mirror (requires mirrorSkillsByName)
chat.description: Discover, preview, and recommend agent skills across tools
tool.read.userDescription: Read full SKILL.md of an installed skill
tool.listCategories.userDescription: List all skill categories with counts
cfg.title: Vibecode Skills Viewer
cfg.includeExtensions: Scan skills bundled by installed VSCode extensions
cfg.tools: AI tools the sidebar surfaces. Toggle enabled to show/hide a tool's skills and instruction files. Add custom entries for tools that aren't built in.
cfg.extraGlobalRoots: Additional absolute paths to scan as global skill roots
cfg.extraWorkspaceRoots: Additional workspace-relative or absolute paths to scan
cfg.instructionFormat: Output format when syncing skills into instruction files
cfg.githubToken: Optional GitHub token for higher rate limits when browsing/installing remote skills (also reads GITHUB_TOKEN env)
cfg.language: Display language for extension UI. "Auto" follows the VSCode locale.
cfg.showToolChips: Show the AI tool filter chip row (All / Claude / Codex / …) at the top of the sidebar. Click a chip to temporarily narrow the visible items to one tool.
